mapper.select: select * from sys_menu menu order by menu.sort

select distinct menu.permission from sys_menu menu left join sys_role_menu role_menu on role_menu.menu_id = menu.id left join sys_user_role user_role on user_role.role_id = role_menu.menu_id left join sys_role role on role.id = user_role.role_id where menu.status = '0' and role.status = '0' and user_role.user_id = #{userId}

select distinct menu.id, menu.name, menu.path, menu.title, menu.icon, menu.badge, menu.target, menu.link, menu.component, menu.render_menu, ifnull(menu.permission, '') as permission, menu.parent_id, menu.cacheable, menu.sort, menu.version, menu.create_by, menu.create_time, menu.update_by, menu.update_time, menu.status from sys_menu menu left join sys_role_menu role_menu on role_menu.menu_id = menu.id left join sys_user_role user_role on user_role.role_id = role_menu.role_id left join sys_role role on role.id = user_role.role_id left join sys_user user on user.id = user_role.user_id where user.id = #{userId} and menu.status = '0' and role.status = '0' order by menu.sort
select * from sys_menu menu left join sys_role_menu role_menu on menu.id = role_menu.menu_id where role_menu.role_id = #{roleId} and menu.status = '0' order by menu.sort
